title: Low input long-read DNA isolation  for Nanopore sequencing
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"b190","text":"DNA isolation from gram negative bacteria with chemical SDS lysis (Phenol) for sequencing on Nanopore. Fast low input cell culture (5ml) with max output (2-3 µg) and longer reads ( 30kb+) .","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: 5 ml bacterial overnight cellculture OD600 (0.8) spin at 4500-5000 x g , 4°C for 15 min. undetermined, bacterial overnight cellculture OD600 (0.8) 00:15:00, spin at 4500-5000 x g , 4°C
Resuspend by pipette mixing in 200 µl sterile PBS. undetermined, 1X PBS 1X PBS (Phosphate-buffered saline )
Add 2.5 ml TLB and vortex at full speed for 10 seconds. 00:00:10 undetermined, TLB
Add 25 µl Qiagen Proteinase K or other stock solution to a final concentration of 200 µg/ml. undetermined, Proteinase K Proteinase K Life Technologies Catalog #17916
Incubate at 50°C for 2 hours, mix every 30 minutes by slowly rotating end-over-end 3 times. Undetermined 02:00:00

Add 2.5 ml Buffered Phenol Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol and mix slowly by rotating end-over-end until mixure becomes milky. Incubate 10 min on a Hula mixer. undetermined, Buffered Phenol Chloroform Isoamyl alcohol
Spin at 5000 x g for 15 min 00:15:00, spin at 5000 x g
Remove the aqueous phases and transfer it into a new tube.

add 5 ml ice-cold 100% Ethanol and 250 µl 3M Sodium Acetate. Mix by slowly rotating end-over-end. undetermined, 100% ice-cold Ethanol undetermined, 3M Sodium Acetat Ethanol (100%, Molecular Biology Grade) Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP2818500 100ml Sodium acetate, pH5.2 [3M] G-Biosciences Catalog #R010
Spin at 5000 x g at 4°C for 30 min. 00:30:00, spin at 5000 x g at 4 °C
Add 200 µl 1 x TE undetermined, 1 x TE Buffer 1 x TE Buffer Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #12090015
Incubate at Roomtemperatur over night (ca. 12 h). 12:00:00, over night
Mix by pippetting with 1000 µl blue tips 4-5 times.
creator: Christian Blumenscheit
